calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-23-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
David Avegalio, Petitioner.

The Court inquired as to whether Annette Alapati has the ability to sign documents in the matter. Mr. Avegalio explained that Ms. Alapati is permanently disabled following a stroke and relies on a long-time caregiver, who is also her partner of over 25 years.

Discussion was held with regards to the estimated value of the estate. Mr. Avegalio estimated the value based on real property to be approximately $193,000 to $250,000, depending on potential additional interests.

After discussion, the court took the matter under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Nov-12-2024 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-15-2024 Continued To Nov-12-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator David Avegalio to appear on November 12, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he failed to appear, and why a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration has not been filed. Status on close of estate is also continued to November 12, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Santos. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-16-2024 Continued To Oct-15-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: David Avegalio in propria persona.

The court asked if a personal representative has been appointed for Jean Arnold's estate. Mr. Avegalio stated that they filed an inventory and appraisal for Jean, that he believes they are on the verge of final distribution, that Christopher passed away and that he is waiting on an inventory and appraisal for Christopher. Mr. Avegalio also stated that Jean does not have a probate case, that she has a trust, that Jean's family has not filed anything with the courts and that the kids need to sign off for Jean and for Christopher. Status on close of estate is continued to October 15, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Jones. Not reported.

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-17-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: David Avegalio in propria persona.

Mr. Avegalio apologized to the court stating that he had two deaths in the family in the month of March, that he forgot about the court date, and that he is trying to get an extension of time because he is waiting on his nephews and his niece to file probate in San Mateo County to receive their mother's share. The court explained the process and the purpose of an affidavit of small estate as well as the probate threshold amount. The Report on Status of Administration is under submission with the court's intent to grant the petition. The order to show cause is off calendar with no sanctions ordered. Status on close of estate is set for July 16, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is to be filed prior to that date.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: D. Nguyen. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Apr-09-2024 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Mar-12-2024 Continued To Apr-09-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear and Order to Show Cause will be issued to the Administrator David Avegalio to appear on April 9, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to show why sanctions in the amount of $250.00 should not be imposed against him for failure to appear at today's hearing. The Report on Status of Administration is also continued to that date.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported.

Off Calendar Sep-26-2022 Continued To Nov-28-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: David Avegalio, in court, in propria persona, Administrator.

The court advises Mr. Avegalio regarding what the court is expecting from him and asks him for an update. Mr. Avegalio reports that his sister, one of the beneficiaries of the estate, passed away and is waiting for confirmation regarding her estate before filing his petition.

The Status Hearing is continued to Nov-28-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Dec-27-2021 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-26-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: David Avegalio appeared by zoom in Propria Persona.

The court asked Mr. Avegalio how he learned to administer an estate. Mr. Avegalio stated that he went to a California document preparer, that he plans to work with them, that he believes the estate holds a 1/3 interest in the Minerva Street property and that he and his niece hold the other percentages in the property. Mr. Avegalio also stated that they do not intend to sell the property, that in his view the property will be a 50/50 interest with him and his niece, that his niece is on board with this plan and that they need to do this for legal purposes. In addition, Mr. Avegalio stated that he went to Ms. Harrington at the recommendation of the document preparer. The court informed Mr. Avegalio that it can grant the petition with a $20,000.00 bond with limited authority. The Petition for Letters of Administration is under submission. Status on filing of the inventory and appraisal is set for December 27, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status on close of estate is set for August 29, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
